title: Navik Overlay
description: This pack includes Crystal PvP Essentials, designed to sharpen your skills and help you climb the ranks in CPvP
body:
![Navik Overlay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc271e65208b90bc234d4642eae74e43378f3c9b.png)
💎 Crystal PvP Essentials Pack

**⚔️ Optimized For**
- Tierlist fights, drain, eval, rekits, and survival.
- pretty much all types of crystalpvp.

**🎯 Visuals**
- Minimal distractions
- small totem pop
- low fire
- clean cyan transparent cobweeb
- no explosion particles
- small pop particles

**⚡ Performance**
- better fps
- better visual peformance

[HT1-HT3 settings](https://discord.com/invite/navik) - for more packs, mods, keybinds and HT1-HT3 player settings
